summary: The receipt file-client divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in decode loop control and test decoder empty-buffer handling; no receipt file client behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 138: M	crates/net/downloaders/src/receipt_file_client.rs.

No partial decode handling, lower-block receipt skipping, receipt counting, or test decoder behavior changed.
